candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred when reported separately.
Also a direct revenue line and likely used in other years.
Financial income, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not revenue.

variables.notes: Selected direct revenue labels as priority list for changing presentation across years. Excluded broader totals like 'Revenue and other income' because REVT should be pure top-line revenue, not other income.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Goods and Services Sold
candidates.why: Direct cost of sales / COGS line on the income statement.
Balance sheet inventory asset, not period cost of goods sold.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of Goods and Services Sold

candidates.why: Broad operating expense total that likely includes COGS, D&A, and impairments; not preferred when components exist.
Valid overhead component and appears to sit above operating income.
Valid overhead component and appears to sit above operating income.
R&D line exists but appears far below operating income in the statement order, so do not include in XSGA per rule.
Capitalized amount, not expense; exclude from SG&A.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet gross asset/cost accumulation, not SG&A expense.
Operating metric, not expense line.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A row is present. Selected overhead components only. Excluded 'Operating Expenses' because it is a subtotal that likely includes COGS, depreciation/amortization, and impairments. Excluded R&D from XSGA because the R&D rows appear below operating income in the preview order.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Amortization subcomponent, not dedicated R&D expense.
Dedicated R&D expense line.
Capitalized offset, not the expense itself.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement R&D expense.
Balance sheet gross amount, not period R&D expense.

variables.notes: Mapped to the dedicated R&D expense line. It appears below operating income, so it is not included in XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Net interest line can serve as fallback where explicit interest expense is not reported.
Too broad and mostly empty; prefer explicit interest expense rows.
Best direct recurring interest expense line.
Likely component of total interest expenses; selecting together with total would double count.
Likely component of total interest expenses; selecting together with total would double count.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense on financial liabilities measured at fair value
candidates.why: Specific component and potentially valuation-related; not preferred over broader recurring interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expenses on Capital Financing, Gross
candidates.why: Relevant conceptually but empty in preview; weaker than direct reported rows.
Capitalized interest is not current period expense.
Recurring finance-cost candidate but broader and secondary to explicit interest expense.
Not finance cost.
Not finance cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure and likely duplicate of lease-interest component.
Balance sheet asset, not interest expense.
Liability balance, not period expense.
Liability balance, not period expense.
Equity item, not finance cost.
Equity item, not finance cost.

variables.notes: Selected 'Interest expenses' as the preferred recurring finance-cost line. Added 'Net interest' as fallback for years where explicit interest expense is not separately reported. Excluded lease-interest and other-interest component rows to avoid double counting because they sum to the total interest expense in reported years.

candidates.why: Income statement profit line, not book equity.
Income statement gain/loss, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: Translation differences related to equity accounted investees
candidates.why: OCI component, not total equity.

candidates.row_label: Change in fair value of equity investments over OCI
candidates.why: OCI component, not total equity.

candidates.row_label: Change in fair value of equity investments
candidates.why: OCI/fair value movement, not total equity.
Investment asset, not shareholders' equity.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to the parent
candidates.why: Best owner/parent equity line; excludes non-controlling interests.
Total equity includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred when parent-only equity exists.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to the parent

variables.notes: Preferred owner/parent equity line to exclude non-controlling interests and avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement profit attribution, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement comprehensive income attribution, not balance sheet minority equity.
Direct balance sheet NCI line.
Direct balance sheet minority interest line; appears duplicate of NCI.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement total, not minority equity balance.

variables.notes: Selected the balance sheet NCI line. Did not also select 'Minority Interest' because it appears to be a duplicate label for the same values, and selecting both would double count.
